summary: The chapter opens with Cheok Jun-Gyung, the 'Boss' of the Chameleon Troupe, receiving a report about Kim Hajin, a unique cadet from an orphanage who possesses a special ability allowing him to perceive through recognition-blocking items. Intrigued, the Boss expresses interest in promising first-year talents, specifically mentioning Hajin. The scene then transitions to a duel where the highly-ranked martial artist Kim Horak, known for his formidable 'Ki Armor' defense, faces the lower-ranked Kim Hajin. Employing 'Bullet Time' and bullets empowered by his Stigma's magic-resistant ability, Hajin skillfully bypasses and shatters Horak's seemingly impenetrable defense, securing an unexpected victory.
key_moments: Cheok Jun-Gyung, the Boss, receives a report about Kim Hajin's unique ability to perceive through recognition-blocking items.
The Boss expresses interest in promising first-year cadets, highlighting Kim Hajin as 'cream of the crop'.
A duel begins between the skilled martial artist Kim Horak (rank 19) and the lower-ranked Kim Hajin (rank 934).
Kim Horak demonstrates his 'Ki Armor', an invisible mana barrier, making him a formidable opponent.
Kim Hajin utilizes 'Bullet Time' and empowers his bullets with his Stigma's magic-resistant ability, successfully breaking through Horak's Ki Armor.
